recommendations.title: La Vie en Rose
recommendations.overview: From the mean streets of the Belleville district of Paris to the dazzling limelight of New York's most famous concert halls, Edith Piaf's life was a constant battle to sing and survive, to live and love. Raised in her grandmother's brothel, Piaf was

recommendations.title: The Dream Team
recommendations.overview: A former footballer living in Brittany enlists his old teammates to help the local fisherman to win some games in order to raise money and save jobs.

recommendations.title: Crimson Rivers II: Angels of the Apocalypse

recommendations.title: The Kissing Booth 2
recommendations.overview: With college decisions looming, Elle juggles her long-distance romance with Noah, changing relationship with bestie Lee and feelings for a new classmate.

recommendations.title: Queen Margot
recommendations.overview: Paris, Kingdom of France, August 18, 1572. To avoid the outbreak of a religious war, the Catholic princess Marguerite de Valois, sister of the feeble King Charles IX, marries the Huguenot King Henry III of Navarre.

recommendations.title: The Last Duel
recommendations.overview: King Charles VI declares that Knight Jean de Carrouges settle his dispute with his squire, Jacques Le Gris, by challenging him to a duel.

recommendations.title: Joyeux Noel
recommendations.overview: France, 1914, during World War I. On Christmas Eve, an extraordinary event takes place in the bloody no man's land that the French and the Scots dispute with the Germans…

recommendations.title: Train Dreams
recommendations.overview: A logger leads a life of quiet grace as he experiences love and loss during an era of monumental change in early 20th-century America.

recommendations.title: Forever My Girl
recommendations.overview: After being gone for a decade, a country star returns home to the love he left behind.
